arts.ttl: Agreement reached between AC Milan and Chelsea for João Felix
arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe journalist Tanzi Loïc, AC Milan have reached an agreement with Chelsea for João Felix (25) for the player to join on loan. The Portuguese…

arts.ttl: Joao Felix set to leave Chelsea for AC Milan
arts.sum: AC Milan are close to agreeing a loan deal for Chelsea's Joao Felix.

arts.ttl: Axel Disasi 'Ready for Medical' Amid Aston Villa Pursuit
arts.sum: Chelsea are open to letting Axel Disasi join Aston Villa in the final hours of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Sky: Milan and Chelsea reach agreement for Joao Felix transfer
arts.sum: Sky Sport Italia reports that Milan and Chelsea have reached an agreement for Joao Felix’s...

arts.ttl: West Ham: Evan Ferguson sets out targets for Hammers loan amid 'big opportunity'
arts.sum: Ferguson has joined Hammers on six-month loan deal from Brighton

arts.ttl: Man City send Chelsea 'next Cole Palmer' deadline day transfer message as secret clause revealed
arts.sum: Indeed, according to our colleagues at The Manchester Evening News, Chelsea recently approached City regarding O'Reilly's availability. O'Reilly only made his Premier League debut for Manchester City last month, coming off the subs bench in a 6-0 win over Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make major Joao Felix transfer demand amid Aston Villa interest and loan option
arts.sum: Chelsea are willing to let Joao Felix leave in a permanent deal on transfer deadline day amid interest from Aston Villa, football.london understands. Aston Villa have been one of the interested clubs, but while football.london understands that they would consider a move for the 25-year-old, they have no interest in paying a fee of over £60million.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Caleb Wiley completes loan switch to Championship promotion contender
arts.sum: Chelsea allow one of the young prospects to complete a loan switch to a Championship promotion contender on transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: West Ham sign Evan Ferguson on loan - no option to buy Brighton striker included in deal
arts.sum: West Ham confirmed the signing of Evan Ferguson on Monday, as the Brighton striker made the move to London on a loan deal for the remainder of the season. According to Sky Sports, the...

arts.ttl: “Not ruled out” | ExWHUEmployee | Daniel Cummings to West Ham update
arts.sum: West Ham haven’t ruled out trying to secure a deal for Daniel Cummings today, despite a rejection from Celtic again. Although West Ham have a pre-contract in place for the striker this summer, the club were eager to secure the move sooner by offering additional funds to enable the move from Celtic during this transfer...
